flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Iona University rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.2k → $27.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Iona University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.8k → $47.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Iona University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Iona University are 44% above 6-year earnings ($51.2k → $73.6k).
